posts.author: duken (duken)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Team,

Im getting No query string error since im new to coding and monday.com could someone help me please.

Set up variables for the Monday API

$apiKey = ‚Äúxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx‚Äù
$apiUrl = ‚Äúhttps://api.monday.com/v2‚Äù

Set up variables for the server

$serverName = ‚Äúgoogle.com‚Äù

Check the server status

$status = Test-Connection $serverName -Count 1 -Quiet

Convert the status to ‚ÄúOnline‚Äù or ‚ÄúOffline‚Äù

if ($status) {
$serverStatus = ‚ÄúOnline‚Äù
} else {
$serverStatus = ‚ÄúOffline‚Äù
}

Set up variables for the Monday.com column

$boardId = ‚Äú4048955123‚Äù
$itemId = ‚Äú4048955140‚Äù
$columnId = ‚Äútext7‚Äù

Set up the JSON payload for the update request

$updateData = @{
query = @"
mutation {
change_column_value (
board_id: $boardId,
item_id: $itemId,
column_id: ‚Äú$columnId‚Äù,
value: ‚Äú{"label":"$serverStatus"}‚Äù
) {
id
}
}
"@
}

Send the update request to the Monday API

Invoke-RestMethod -Method POST -Uri $apiUrl -Headers @{Authorization = ‚ÄúBearer $apiKey‚Äù} -Body ($updateData | ConvertTo-Json)
